Appearance

RagNextGame Designer

Visual node graph editor and runtime scripting compiler for next-gen narrative games.

Get Started
🧩

Node-Based Graph Scripting

Build complex narrative flow, conditional pathways, inventory transactions, and dialog trees visually.

🤖

AI-Assisted Action Compiling

Generate complete functional action subgraphs directly from natural language prompts using built-in LLM integrations.

📅

Rich Type-Aware Variables

Fully supports string, numeric, boolean, and comprehensive date/time operations both in the editor and player.
